expectation.expectedValue: Descubrimiento_de_Vehiculos
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the model spec via Get_Vehicle_Detail OR Knowledge. The exact specification cited must match the source: E-Cruiser autonomy = 520 km WLTP. Agent must NOT fabricate any other figure.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Cuál es la autonomía WLTP del E-Cruiser?

expectation.expectedValue: Descubrimiento_de_Vehiculos
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the model spec via Get_Vehicle_Detail OR Knowledge. E-Sport 0-100 km/h = 4.2 seg. Must match source and not invent another acceleration figure.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Cuánto tarda el E-Sport en hacer 0 a 100?

expectation.expectedValue: Estado_y_FAQ
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the warranty coverage table. Battery (high-voltage) warranty = 8 years OR 160.000 km. Must NOT confuse with general vehicle warranty (4 years / 80.000 km).
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Cuántos años cubre la garantía de la batería?

expectation.expectedValue: Estado_y_FAQ
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the warranty table. General vehicle (paint, suspension, brakes, electrical) warranty = 4 years OR 80.000 km. Must NOT cite the battery 8-year figure here.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Cuál es la cobertura de la garantía general del vehículo?

expectation.expectedValue: Estado_y_FAQ
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the charging table. E-Truck 10-80% fast charge time = 35 min at 150 kW. Must distinguish from other models (which are 25-30 min).
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Cuánto tarda el E-Truck en cargarse de 10 a 80% en una estación rápida?

expectation.expectedValue: Estado_y_FAQ
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the wallbox charging table. E-City wallbox 7 kW charging adds approximately 30 km/h.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Si cargo el E-City en un wallbox de 7 kW en casa, ¿cuántos km de autonomía gano por hora?

expectation.expectedValue: Descubrimiento_de_Vehiculos
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves catalog data via Get_Vehicle_Detail or Knowledge. Cross-row comparison: E-Cruiser autonomy 520 km vs E-City autonomy 360 km. Must report both figures correctly and identify E-Cruiser as the longer-range model.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Qué modelo tiene más autonomía, el E-Cruiser o el E-City?

expectation.expectedValue: Estado_y_FAQ
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the maintenance schedule table. First service at 10.000 km is FREE (Gratis) at the dealership in the first year. Must cite "Concesionaria Electra" or equivalent and not fabricate a price.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Cuánto sale el primer service del auto?

expectation.expectedValue: Descubrimiento_de_Vehiculos
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves catalog data via Get_Vehicle_Detail or Knowledge. E-Truck and E-Cruiser fast-charge power = 150 kW. May report uniformly that all models except E-City charge at 150 kW (E-City is 100 kW). Must NOT fabricate a different number.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿Cuál es la potencia máxima de carga rápida del E-Truck?

expectation.expectedValue: Estado_y_FAQ
expectation.name: topic_sequence_match

expectation.expectedValue: Agent retrieves the corrosion warranty row. Coverage = 12 years, no kilometer limit. Must not confuse with general 4-year warranty.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: ¿La garantía cubre corrosión perforante de la carrocería?
